Bad Boys: Ride or Die (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $193,573,217Details
International Box Office $206,953,020
Worldwide Box Office $400,526,237
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,413,166
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,077,125
Total $5,490,291
Further financial details...

Synopsis

This Summer, the world’s favorite Bad Boys are back with their iconic mix of edge-of-your seat action and outrageous comedy but this time with a twist: Miami’s finest are now on the run

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$56,527,324 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $204,698,115
